metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5492
metadata.comment:
Rationale: immunoEM of Rat spinal cord stained for CCK-8 showed localization to presynaptic dense core vesicles.. Experimental description: M&M: "Twenty-seven adult male rats (Wistar, 250g) were used for the study."

antibody:
"The nonspecific absorption of the sheep antibodies coupled to peroxidase was determined by omitting the CCKoctapeptide antibodies in the first incubating medium: under such conditions no staining was observed in the sections. The same result was obtained when the CCK-octapeptide antiserum (at the dilution of I/500) was preincubated with I pg/ml of authentic sulphated CCK-8 before the incubation with tissue sections. Preincubation of the antiserum with 50 pg/ml of pentagastrin or CCK-4 also resulted in an almost complete absence of staining, therefore confirming that antibodies cross-reacted with these substances [as shown with radioimmunoassay (RIA) conditions, see above]. On the contrary, preincubation of the antiserum with 50pg/ml of thyroglobulin, (the protein used as carrier), [Leulenkephalin, [Metlenkephalin or substance P did not affect the staining."
